scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const f of ['package-lock.json','yarn.lock']) fs.rmSync(f,{force:true}); const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||''; if (ua && !/^pnpm\//.test(ua)) console.warn('Use pnpm instead');"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --workspace-concurrency=1 --if-present run build
scripts.deploy:build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm --filter @workspace/fitness-rpg run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
